user.title: Connect to Pylontech H3X Bridge
user.description: Enter the Modbus TCP connection details of your inverter.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the inverter.

init.title: Update Pylontech H3X Bridge connection

test_force_charge_modes.description: Try a temporary force-charge slot using EMS mode 5 and EMS mode 4, returning measured snapshots.
